sourcesAnalyzed.notes: Primary website domain expired. Brand research sourced from Instagram @labonita.latin.restaurant, Facebook /labonitalatina, Yelp (79 photos, 32 reviews), Google Reviews (851 reviews, 4.3/5), Wanderlog, TripAdvisor, Visit Mississauga, and DoorDash listings.

archetype.rationale: Latin American restaurant where foot traffic, neighbourhood identity, and authentic dining atmosphere are the primary draw. Customers describe the cozy space, generous portions, and family-style warmth. Located in a strip plaza at Canadian Place in Mississauga — foot traffic and local word-of-mouth drive business.

primary.usage: CTA buttons, accent highlights — inspired by the red South America silhouette in La Bonita's logo and Colombian cultural warmth

secondary.usage: Secondary accents, hover states, gold/yellow warmth — evokes Latin sunshine, tropical fruits, and the Colombian flag yellow

accent.usage: Tertiary accent — Colombian green from the flag, freshness indicators, garnish accents

main.usage: Page background — warm off-white, inviting and light like a family kitchen

alternate.usage: Alternating sections — slightly warmer cream tone

heading.usage: Deep espresso brown for headings — ties to Colombian cafe culture

body.usage: Warm dark brown for body text — readable and earthy

borders.usage: Dividers, card borders — warm subtle tone

gradients.usage: Hero overlay for text readability over food photography

colorPalette.overallTheme: warm-earthy — Light off-white backgrounds (#FFF9F2) with deep espresso-brown text (#2B1810) and vibrant Latin red (#E8443A) and gold (#F7B731) accents. CSS evidence: Original website domain expired; storefront signage uses dark grey/black background with script 'La' and sans-serif 'Bonita' in white/light text, with a pink/red South America map silhouette as logo. Instagram grid shows bright, warm food photography with colorful Colombian platters against clean table surfaces. bgMain source: No live site CSS available (domain expired). Default to light/warm based on Instagram grid aesthetic showing bright food on light surfaces, and storefront OPEN sign with clean glass exterior.

headingFont.style: elegant and warm — inspired by the script/serif 'La' lettering on the storefront sign. Libre Baskerville provides the traditional warmth and established feel appropriate for a family restaurant since 2016

bodyFont.style: friendly and approachable — rounded sans-serif that matches the warm, family-oriented atmosphere. The 'Bonita' text on the storefront uses a clean sans-serif, and Nunito Sans captures that friendliness

sampleCaptions: Ven a disfrutar de nuestros platos tipicos! Come enjoy our traditional dishes!
Bandeja Paisa hecha con amor. Made with love.
La Bonita - highlighting Latin culture through exquisite dishes that will delight the palate of the whole family

contentStrategy.valueProposition: Authentic Latin American cuisine from grandmother's recipes — Colombian classics with generous portions and warm family hospitality since 2016
keyMessages: I grew up working in my grandmother's restaurant — La Bonita follows her footsteps
Generous portions of authentic Colombian dishes made fresh daily
A cozy neighbourhood gem where every guest is treated like family

imageStrategy.composition: overhead food shots, plated dishes, generous portions

food.description: Sancocho — traditional Colombian beef and vegetable soup with rice, avocado sides
Churrasco feast platter — grilled steak, chorizo, fried plantains, salad, sides on display
Sancocho Antioqueno — hearty soup with corn, potatoes, beef, cilantro garnish

atmosphere.description: La Bonita storefront — grey signage with script lettering, South America silhouette logo, OPEN sign, glass doors at 1065 Canadian Place

people.name: Owner (name not publicly listed)
people.bio: I grew up working in my Grandmother's restaurant and seeing her passion and love with which she created a high quality menu and variety of flavors, I decided to follow her footsteps in creating a space with a cozy atmosphere, offering typical Latin American dishes especially Colombia.
